reg1.formula: pct_ug_off_campus = β₀ + β₁·retention_rate + β₂·pct_oos_ug + β₃·pct_need_met + ε
reg1.note: Ridge regression (α=1.0) used to handle multicollinearity

reg2.formula: total_undergrad = β₀ + β₁·tuition_instate + β₂·pct_oos_ug + β₃·retention_rate + ε
reg2.note: Ridge regression (α=1.0) used to handle multicollinearity

reg3.formula: demand(t+1) = β₀ + β₁·demand(t) + β₂·retention_rate + β₃·pct_oos_ug + ε
reg3.note: Autoregressive specification. Ridge regression (α=1.0). High VIFs expected with 3-school panel — will resolve as panel grows.
